strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Founder experience (GISCollective) plus open-source leadership, talks, and workshops showing initiative and knowledge-sharing
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, with strong builder/code fluency
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at scale — recent agent tooling work is early and narrow
Career track is Senior/Staff IC on product teams; no evidence of director-level strategic influence, executive advisory, or org-wide technical leadership
Limited cloud platform strategy depth — experience is application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than defining future-state cloud/AI platforms

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC scope
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial background

response.justification: The candidate comfortably meets the 15-year experience bar and shows genuine builder fluency, entrepreneurial drive, and community leadership. However, this role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and a track record of shaping platform direction and advising strategic customers. His profile is a strong senior/staff product engineer with emerging AI-agent tooling exposure, not an established AI strategist, so the fit for this specific role is weak despite solid fundamentals.
